- **Go module:** `github.com/cisec/aisac-agent`

### Always

- Handle every `error` return explicitly — wrap with context using `fmt.Errorf("...: %w", err)`
- Edge Functions run on Deno — use `Deno.serve()`, import from `jsr:`/`npm:`, no Node built-ins

### Never

- Never invent file paths, function names, hook names, or table names — always verify in the codebase first
- Never silently swallow errors — surface them via the project's error handler
- Never discard Go errors with `_`
